basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline. The offline application process is open until 31-07-2026, and candidates are advised to send their completed applications well before the deadline. how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application form for the PAU Research Fellow position is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B. Tech. in Computer Science/BCA/B.E. Computer Science/B. Tech Electronics and Communication/B. Tech Electrical with a minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks. Alternatively, a Master's Degree in Computer Science/Application/Electronics and Communication/Electrical with a minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks (with or without NET) is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- fixed plus 16% HRA per month for candidates with NET qualification. For those without NET, the salary is Rs. 25,000/- fixed plus 16% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Fellow post at PAU?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to obtain the prescribed proforma from the office, fill it carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it to the mentioned address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee should be paid in the form of a bank draft in favour of Comptroller, PAU Ludhiana.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Fellow position will be based on an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Research Fellow position at Punjab Agricultural University is a temporary job.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the application form for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The application form can be obtained from the office Room no. 112 of the department against the payment of Rs. 200/-. You can also check the official website for any downloadable proforma.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The exact address to send the application form will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to carefully check the notification for the correct mailing address.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application form for the PAU Research Fellow position is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
